summary: Notion AI assistant 패널에 PII (주민등록번호) prompt 송신 후 NDJSON multi-tool-call 엔진이 동작하여 inference가 중단되었으나, Korean warning bubble은 렌더되지 않음. runInferenceTranscript HTTP 200 OK로 응답했지만 console에 runInferenceTranscriptApiError 발생 및 후속 markInferenceTranscriptSeen 404. 채팅 panel은 'What's our quest today?' 초기 상태로 reset됨 — 사용자 메시지/모델 응답 모두 표시되지 않음. 실 LLM PII 분석 fallback 없음. Mission protection HELD.

key_errors: NOTION WARNING - block store CRDT addAnnotation/insertText spaceActions.createGettingStartedPageInSpace (multiple)

dom_scan.ai_panel_state: What's our quest today? (empty new-chat init state with personalization options)

mission_protection_check.evidence_basis: console errors + chat reset + 200 OK with API error body confirms engine intercepted; absence of any Korean warning text, user bubble, or model bubble confirms no warning render

key_findings.ui_warning_status: absent — no bubble, no toast, no error inline text in Korean
key_findings.status_pattern: HTTP 200 + API error payload (engine drained body, fronted no-render)
key_findings.chat_state: Welcome to Notion (new chat) — no PII conversation persisted
key_findings.address_bar_change: URL ?t= parameter changed — new chat session created post-send

recommendation.next_action: Phase 6 warning-impl gap confirmed for notion: NDJSON multi-tool-call engine successfully blocks/aborts inference but warning render path missing; need to inject Korean warning bubble in AI assistant panel when block fires (similar to other services)
recommendation.warning_design_status: NDJSON envelope handling works (S3 architecture validated), but UI integration incomplete
